title: rahulbhardwaj94/vani
summary: LokVaani (लोकवाणी) — fully local, open-source voice dictation for macOS (Apple Silicon). On-device Whisper + Ollama — an open-source Wispr Flow alternative. No cloud, no subscription.

title: hanumanit/garuda
summary: Rust MoE inference runtime with tiered expert storage — loads real GGUF models; speaks OpenAI, Ollama, Anthropic, llama.cpp & TGI APIs

title: VeridonNetzwerk/Nox
summary: Local AI Desktop Assistant for Windows. Voice-enabled, 100% offline, open source. Powered by Ollama (Gemma 4), faster-whisper, Edge TTS, Kokoro & openWakeWord.

title: vachhanidhyey/llm_intercept
summary: 🚀 Intercept and log LLM calls to build fine-tuning datasets for compact models, enabling cost-effective and efficient AI training.

title: rodelgithub/local-llm-bridge
summary: Unlock AI Coding with OpenCode Local Provider 2026 - Auto-Detect Ollama LM Studio

title: jachinsamuel/Ace
summary: AI-powered Git copilot for your terminal. Talk to Git in plain English, automate commits, review code, and manage repos with a beautiful TUI.

title: Gaurav-Gosain/turbograph
summary: Fast, local, hackable graph RAG engine in Go: hybrid dense+lexical retrieval, PageRank over a chunk+entity graph, community summaries for global queries, multimodal, single binary, local Ollama.

title: raffaelefarinaro/ciaobot
summary: Ciaobot is an opinionated interface for using Claude Code and/or Codex as a personal assistant and second brain. It is a local web app around agentic work: chats, projects, files, schedules, memory, and archived knowledge all live in one interface instead of being scattered across terminal sessions.

title: MissyLabs/missy
summary: Security-first local AI assistant for Linux — agentic runtime with policy enforcement, multi-provider support, voice channel, Discord, and full auditability

title: Jo4ge/multi-agent-chat
summary: 🤖 Engage in dynamic conversations with multiple AI personalities in a group chat, enhancing your interactive experience with real-time responses.

title: wyc-dev/MATS
summary: An autonomous, self-evolving quantitative trading system powered by 8 specialized AI agents with institutional-grade risk management.

title: munnabhaiiii981/llm-attention-visualizer
summary: 🔍 Visualize attention patterns in transformer models to better understand how LLMs process text inputs with interactive heatmaps and comparisons.

title: r3dbars/nightshift
summary: Put your idle AI hardware to work while you sleep. Overnight, your machines scan the repo, draft safe work, and hand you a ranked morning brief. Drafts, not deploys. Local-first, MIT.

title: lnwmasters/AI-Agent-Guide

title: SunMe1977/HermesClawZero-ConfigSidecar

title: kilxnix/praxis

summary: Interactive AI coding agent using free OpenRouter models with real tool calling
